scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp -R css js _headers dist/
scripts.dev: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name asteroids --branch main
